name: skeleton
title: Skeleton
description: Loading placeholder with text, circular, and rectangular variants. Supports multi-line text and shimmer animation.

height.description: Height as a CSS value string or number (px).

lines.description: Number of text lines. Only used when variant is 'text'.

shimmer.description: Whether to show the shimmer animation.

width.description: Width as a CSS value string (e.g. '200px', '100%') or number (px).

height.description: Height as a CSS value string or number (px).

lines.description: Number of text lines. Only used when variant is 'text'.

shimmer.description: Whether to show the shimmer animation.

width.description: Width as a CSS value string (e.g. '200px', '100%') or number (px).

peerDependencies.frameworks: Custom Elements; React 18/19 wrappers; Angular 19-22 standalone adapters.
